_doc: Synthetic aging fixtures for the deterministic apply layer (mark note stale / escalate a contradiction). The LLM verdict itself (atual|stale|superseded-candidata) is NOT re-evaluated by unit tests here; it is backtested at install time (docs/ARCHITECTURE.md, installer flow Phase 5). What these fixtures pin down is that, given a canned verdict, the deterministic layer writes the right thing: status: stale in frontmatter for 'stale', a new escalation queue entry (never a direct edit) for 'superseded-candidata'.
